infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Performance OS reads your Apple Health data (sleep, HRV, heart rate, workouts, activity) to calculate readiness and personalize recommendations.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Performance OS can write approved workouts and body metrics back to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Performance OS uses the camera to photograph meals for automatic nutrition estimation.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Performance OS lets you upload meal photos from your library for nutrition estimation.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Performance OS uses the microphone for voice journal and voice food logging.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Performance OS to photograph meals for nutrition estimation.

plugins.healthSharePermission: Performance OS reads Health data to compute readiness.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: Performance OS writes approved workouts to Health.
